payload.decision: Commit two durable preference facts as separate atomic memory cards.

entity_resolution.reason: The table provides only names and preferences with no prior entity context or ambiguous duplicates to resolve.

payload.intent: Extract atomic preference memory cards from the provided table.

details: Created one atomic memory card per person-preference pair.

raw_text: {"intent":"Extract atomic preference memory cards from the provided table.","decision":"Commit two durable preference facts as separate atomic memory cards.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam prefers Bill Evans.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"person","role":"preferred entity"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"prefers","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Daniele prefers knowledge graphs.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Daniele","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"knowledge graphs","type":"concept","role":"preferred topic"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Daniele","predicate":"prefers","object":"knowledge graphs"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The table provides only names and preferences with no prior entity context or ambiguous duplicates to resolve."},"conflict_classification":"no_conflict","answer":"Extracted 2 atomic preference memory cards.","citations":["fixture:memory_compiler_small_table"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Parsed 2 rows from the table.","Created one atomic memory card per person-preference pair.","No conflicts or supersessions detected."]}}
